description.value: You imbue your armor with a righteous aura. It gains a +1 enhancement bonus per four caster levels (maximum +5 at 20th level). When using your judgment or smite ability, you gain DR 5/ evil. An outfit of regular clothing counts as armor that grants no AC bonus for the purpose of this spell.
